features.name: A/B Bonus Multiplier Ladder
features.description: Three Group A targets and three Group B lanes latch when activated. Completing either group arms its bonus trough. Claiming both group bonuses advances the score multiplier ladder from 2x through 100x and scales scored switch values from their base scores. Draining the ball resets group progress, claim lights, armed troughs, and the active multiplier.
features.goal: Reward completing both target groups repeatedly with escalating table-wide score multipliers.
